'''âl-dh-m''' ('''kaladham''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cam|cam]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-dh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cam|cam]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-dh-m
|-
! Lemma
| kaladham
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiladham|thiladham]] || [[word:jiladham|jiladham]] || [[word:shiladham|shiladham]] || [[word:kiladham|kiladham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuladham|thuthuladham]] || [[word:jujuladham|jujuladham]] || [[word:shushuladham|shushuladham]] || [[word:kukuladham|kukuladham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuladham|thuladham]] || [[word:juladham|juladham]] || [[word:shuladham|shuladham]] || [[word:kuladham|kuladham]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuladham|thuladham]] || [[word:juladham|juladham]] || [[word:shuladham|shuladham]] || [[word:kuladham|kuladham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theladham|theladham]] || [[word:jeladham|jeladham]] || [[word:sheladham|sheladham]] || [[word:keladham|keladham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholadham|thotholadham]] || [[word:jojoladham|jojoladham]] || [[word:shosholadham|shosholadham]] || [[word:kokoladham|kokoladham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholadham|tholadham]] || [[word:joladham|joladham]] || [[word:sholadham|sholadham]] || [[word:koladham|koladham]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholadham|tholadham]] || [[word:joladham|joladham]] || [[word:sholadham|sholadham]] || [[word:koladham|koladham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠladham|thĂŠladham]] || [[word:jĂŠladham|jĂŠladham]] || [[word:shĂŠladham|shĂŠladham]] || [[word:kĂŠladham|kĂŠladham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathaladham|thathaladham]] || [[word:jajaladham|jajaladham]] || [[word:shashaladham|shashaladham]] || [[word:kakaladham|kakaladham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thaladham|thaladham]] || [[word:jaladham|jaladham]] || [[word:shaladham|shaladham]] || [[word:kaladham|kaladham]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thaladham|thaladham]] || [[word:jaladham|jaladham]] || [[word:shaladham|shaladham]] || [[word:kaladham|kaladham]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shaladham|shaladham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshaladham|goshaladham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishaladham|gokishaladham]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shaladhamnĂŒ|shaladhamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshaladhamnknĂŒ|goshaladhamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishaladhamnĂŒ|gokishaladhamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shaladhamshĂ«|shaladhamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshaladhamnkshĂ«|goshaladhamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishaladhamshĂ«|gokishaladhamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaladhamro|shaladhamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaladhamnkro|goshaladhamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaladhamro|gokishaladhamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shaladhamu|shaladhamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaladhamnkmu|goshaladhamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaladhamu|gokishaladhamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shaladhamsher|shaladhamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshaladhamnksher|goshaladhamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishaladhamsher|gokishaladhamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shaladhamng|shaladhamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshaladhamnkng|goshaladhamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishaladhamng|gokishaladhamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shaladhamya|shaladhamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshaladhamnkya|goshaladhamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishaladhamya|gokishaladhamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shaladhamyam|shaladhamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshaladhamnkyam|goshaladhamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishaladhamyam|gokishaladhamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shaladhamnĂŒshĂ«|shaladhamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshaladhamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshaladhamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishaladhamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishaladhamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaladhamnĂŒro|shaladhamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaladhamnknĂŒro|goshaladhamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaladhamnĂŒro|gokishaladhamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shaladhamnĂŒmu|shaladhamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaladhamnknĂŒmu|goshaladhamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaladhamnĂŒmu|gokishaladhamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shaladhamshĂ«nĂŒ|shaladhamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshaladhamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshaladhamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishaladhamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishaladhamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaladhamshĂ«ro|shaladhamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaladhamnkshĂ«ro|goshaladhamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaladhamshĂ«ro|gokishaladhamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shaladhamshĂ«mu|shaladhamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaladhamnkshĂ«mu|goshaladhamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaladhamshĂ«mu|gokishaladhamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shaladhamronĂŒ|shaladhamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshaladhamnkronĂŒ|goshaladhamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishaladhamronĂŒ|gokishaladhamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shaladhamroshĂ«|shaladhamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshaladhamnkroshĂ«|goshaladhamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishaladhamroshĂ«|gokishaladhamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shaladhamromu|shaladhamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshaladhamnkromu|goshaladhamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishaladhamromu|gokishaladhamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shaladhamunĂŒ|shaladhamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshaladhamnkmunĂŒ|goshaladhamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishaladhamunĂŒ|gokishaladhamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shaladhamushĂ«|shaladhamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshaladhamnkmushĂ«|goshaladhamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishaladhamushĂ«|gokishaladhamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shaladhamuro|shaladhamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshaladhamnkmuro|goshaladhamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishaladhamuro|gokishaladhamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
